title: sutera cordata
intro: Sutera cordata, also known as the Cardina or Sutera plant, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sutera cordata include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
